channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Aeternum C2 Botnet Stores Encrypted Commands on Polygon Blockchain to Evade Takedown
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new botnet loader called Aeternum C2 that uses a blockchain-based command-and-control (C2) infrastructure to make it resilient to takedown efforts...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Trend Micro warns of critical Apex One code execution flaws
item.description: Trend Micro has patched two critical Apex One vulnerabilities that allow attackers to gain remote code execution (RCE) on vulnerable Windows systems. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: European DYI chain ManoMano data breach impacts 38 million customers
item.description: DIY store chain ManoMano is notifying customers of a data breach personal data, which was caused by hackers compromising a third-party service provider. [...]...

item.title: Critical Juniper Networks PTX flaw allows full router takeover
item.description: A critical vulnerability in the Junos OS Evolved network operating system running on PTX Series routers from Juniper Networks could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute code remotely with root...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Olympique Marseille confirms 'attempted' cyberattack after data leak
item.description: French professional football club Olympique de Marseille has confirmed a cyberattack after a threat actor claimed on Monday that it breached the club's systems earlier this month. [...]...

item.title: UAT-10027 Targets U.S. Education and Healthcare with Dohdoor Backdoor
item.description: A previously undocumented threat activity cluster has been attributed to an ongoing malicious campaign targeting education and healthcare sectors in the U.S. since at least December 2025. The campaign...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: Kali Linux + Claude, Chrome Crash Traps, WinRAR Flaws, LockBit & 15+ Stories

item.title: Ransomware payment rate drops to record low as attacks surge
item.description: The number of ransomware victims paying threat actors has dropped to 28% last year, an all-time low, despite a significant increase in the number of claimed attacks. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Microsoft expands Windows restore to more enterprise devices
item.description: Microsoft now allows more enterprise users to restore their personal settings and Microsoft Store apps from a previous Windows 11 device. [...]...

item.title: Vitalik Buterin Surpasses 16,384 Ethereum Sale Target — Here’s Why He May Sell More

item.title: Stripe: Most Blockchains Aren’t Ready for Payments — Stablecoins Already Are
item.description: Stripe says most blockchains lack the speed, reliability, and predictable costs needed for real payments. Stablecoins already enable true global fintech with borderless infrastructure launched ......

item.title: Why Bitcoin Is Pumping: Jane Street Exposé Sparks Sudden Shift in Sentiment
